service.name: Fix my pub
service.description: Practical pub marketing and recovery help from a working licensee. Fast diagnosis, a simple plan, and templates that get implemented.

hero.title: Pub Struggling? Let's Fix It
hero.subtitle: Whether your pub is in crisis or just needs a reset, tell me what's broken. I'll tell you the fastest thing to fix first — and give you the templates to implement it this week.
hero.ctaText: Hi Peter, please help me fix my pub
hero.bottomText: £75/hour + VAT • No fixed retainers • Peter responds within 24 hours

intro.heading: Start with the fastest win
paragraphs: Most pubs don't need more ideas. They need one clear priority and a simple system that gets done while the pub stays busy. If your pub is in crisis, we start with emergency triage to stop the bleeding first.

I run The Anchor and built practical marketing systems that accelerate execution and drive footfall. We moved food GP from 58% to 71%, grew quiz night to 25-35 regulars, and hit 60-70K monthly social media views — all in a real pub, not a textbook.

Whether you need a full pub rescue or just a nudge in the right direction, message me what is hurting trade and I'll point you at the fastest win: local discovery, a midweek hook, better offers, or a tighter social system.

items.title: Fast diagnosis
items.description: We pinpoint what is actually causing the drop — whether it's a slow decline or a pub in crisis, we identify the root cause: visibility, offer, messaging, or execution.

items.title: 30-day action plan
items.description: A simple plan to stabilise trade and build momentum with weekly focus.

items.title: Templates and scripts
items.description: Ready-to-use messages, posts, and checklists so your team can implement quickly.

items.title: Google and local visibility
items.description: Fix the basics that stop customers choosing you: photos, reviews, categories, and posts.

items.title: Midweek systems
items.description: Repeatable hooks that turn quiet nights into regulars.

items.title: Ongoing support (optional)
items.description: Stay hands-on or just get the plan - we decide what fits your time and budget.

steps.title: Message me
steps.description: Tell me the pub type and the one thing hurting trade. You'll hear back from Peter within 24 hours — no sales pitch, just practical advice.

steps.title: Pick the win
steps.description: We choose the fastest improvement to make in the next 7 to 30 days.

steps.title: Implement fast
steps.description: You get templates, checklists, and clear next actions so it actually gets done.

steps.title: Measure and adjust
steps.description: We double down on what works and stop wasting time on what doesn't.

faqs.question: Is this for pubs only?
faqs.answer: Yes for now. Everything here is built around pub trade and what works on the floor.

faqs.question: How quickly can you help?
faqs.answer: We can usually start with a quick chat straight away. The first wins can happen in days, with proper momentum building over 30 days.

faqs.question: Do you do it for me or show me how?
faqs.answer: Either. Some pubs want a simple plan and templates. Others want hands-on help. We'll choose what fits your time and budget.

faqs.question: How much does it cost?
faqs.answer: £75 per hour plus VAT. No fixed retainers and no long contracts.

faqs.question: Can you work remotely?
faqs.answer: Yes. Most work can be done remotely with your team: messaging, templates, content planning, offers, and training.

cta.title: Want me to help fix your pub?
cta.subtitle: Message me what is going wrong and I'll tell you the fastest win to start with.
cta.whatsappMessage: Hi Peter, please help me fix my pub. Can we have a quick chat?
